description:
This cordless heating pad delivers an all-in-one massage experience, with 6 heating levels, 3 air compression massage modes, 3 air compression intensity levels and 3 vibration modes, able to provide soothing warmth and comfort to our lower back, waist, belly, shoulder, knee and legs. Fast heat up for 3S, support screen lock, auto shut off for 15 minutes for safety. Fit for all waists. Cordless and USB rechargeable, easy to carry everywhere. Digital display, easy to read and use. An ideal gift for our mother, father, lover and colleague etc..

Feature：

  • All-In-One Massage Experience: This wearable heating pad features 6 heating levels, 3 air compression massage modes, 3 air compression intensity levels and 3 vibration modes, able to provide soothing warmth and comfort to our back, waist, belly, shoulder, knee and legs. You can pair it with mugwort bag(Not Included) for heat therapy or ice pack(Not Included) for cold therapy.

 

  • 3S Fast Heating & 15Mins Shutoff: This cordless heating pad can heat up for 3S to reach the desired temperature, allowing us to experience soothing warmth within seconds. Auto shut off for 15 minutes for safety.

 

  • Cordless & USB Rechargeable: The cordless design allows us to use the lower back massager heating pad anywhere without being restricted by power outlets or tangled cords. The 3000mAh rechargeable battery can last up to 5-6 massage times after fully charged.

 

  • Universal Fit & Screen Lock: With the 42.52in long belt, our lower back massager with air compression fits for all waist. Digital display, easy to read and use. Also provide a screen lock feature to prevent accidental touch.

 

  • Thoughtful Gift: This massaging heating pad is great for lower back pain, period cramps, muscle tension, relaxation or simply keeping warm in cold weather. A thoughtful gift for lover, mother, daughter and colleague etc..

Specification：

Product Type: Lower Back Massager Heating Pad
Color: Navy Blue
Materials: Elastic Wool Fabric+Compound Fabric+PU leather+ABS Controller
Inbuilt Battery: 3.7V 3000mAh Polymer Battery
Motor Quantity: 4Pcs
Rated Power: 7W
Rated Voltage: 5V
Air Compression Massage:
*3 Modes: Knead(Default), Massage, Powerful, OFF(Short Press)
*3 Intensity Levels: Gentle, Soothing, Strong, OFF(Short Press)
*Air Compression Mode & Intensity Display: On The Left
*Indicator Light: Mode(Green), Intensity(Red)
*Long press Air Compression Button to switch between Air Compression Mode Setup and Intensity Setup
6 Heating Levels:
*40℃/104℉, 45℃/113℉, 50℃/122℉, 55℃/131℉, 60℃/140℉, 70℃/158℉
*Temperature Unit Display: Celsius
*Short press Temperature Button to disactivate heating(Display: “00”)
3 Vibration Modes:
*Gentle(Default), Soothing, Strong, OFF
*Vibration Mode Display: On The Right
*Indicator Light: Green
Screen Lock: Short press Power Button to lock or unlock the screen after startup
Power ON/OFF: Long press Power Button
Programmed Auto Timer: 15Mins
Applicable Massage Times: Around 5-6 Times After Fully Charged
Charging Time: Around 3.5Hours
Suitable For Waist: 73-104cm/28.74-40.94in
Charging Cable Length: 50.5cm/19.88in
Item Size: 108x23x0.5cm/42.52x9.06x0.2in
Item Weight: 728g/1.6 lbs
Package Size: 36*24*7cm/14.17*9.44*2.75in
Package Weight: 980g/2.16lbs

PackageContents：

1 x Lower Back Massager Heating Pad
1 x Type-C USB Cable
1 x User Manual

 

    Friendly Reminder:
  • 1. During the first week, please do not wear the belt too long for adaption.
  • 2. It is not suitable for wearing the belt when you sleep, it may lead to blood stagnation.
  • 3. Not suitable for pregnancy, bleeding, malignant tumor, intense heat, skin lesion, severe hypertension, serious osteoporosis.
  • 4. It\'s recommended to put a piece of cloth on belly during use.
  • 5. Please fully charge the massager before first use.
  • 6.The massage cannot work during charging.
